## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] `.env` is not committed
- [ ] Private keys are not committed
- [ ] Database dumps are not committed
- [ ] Admin checks are preserved
- [ ] User ownership checks are preserved
- [ ] Config writes are atomic/safe
- [ ] Logs do not expose secrets
